structured.title: Lidl Shop Sparks Dinner Planning
structured.overview: A couple discuss their Lidl grocery haul, comparing prices against Tesco and using ChatGPT/Gemini to estimate savings. They debate Clubcard pricing, cheap snacks, cheese blocks vs sliced cheese, garlic bread, chicken, beans, and what to cook for dinner. The conversation is light and domestic, with some joking about missing items, budget shopping, and how much the groceries should last.
